product_overview: Docente App - Pro is a mobile-first PWA that lets teachers manage courses, record attendance, create tasks, view grades and backup/restore app data entirely in the browser using localStorage. It provides a compact single-file frontend with modals, toasts and a bottom navigation for quick access to four main views.
core_goals: Provide an offline-capable, single-file web app for teachers to manage courses, attendance, tasks and basic grade summaries.
Keep data locally persistent in the browser with simple export/import backup to allow portability.
Offer a clean mobile-first UI with quick workflows (add course, mark attendance, create tasks) and simple export options (CSV/JSON).
Support user personalization (welcome name) and theme preference (dark mode) persisted across sessions.

features.name: User Login / Welcome
features.description: Show a first-time welcome modal to capture the teacher's name and personalize the app header greeting. The name is saved to localStorage and prevents the modal from showing again.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> See welcome modal on first visit -> Fill name input field with the teacher's name -> Click "Empezar ahora" button to submit -> See personalized greeting in header
Navigate to /index.html -> See welcome modal on first visit -> Click backdrop or close modal without filling name -> Reload /index.html -> See welcome modal again (name not saved)

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Bottom navigation bar to switch between four primary views (Cursos, Asistencia, Tareas, Notas) with the active button highlighted.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses -> See view-cursos section become active -> See "Cursos" nav button highlighted in primary color

Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Notas" nav button to view grades -> See average grades per course display "8.5" for all courses -> Observe that displayed averages are hardcoded and may not reflect real data

features.name: Course Management
features.description: View course cards with name, schedule, student count and progress; add new courses via a modal form.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses -> Click "+" button to open Add Course modal -> Fill course name input -> Fill schedule input -> Click "Añadir" button to create new course -> See toast notification after course creation -> See new course in the list with 0% progress and default students

Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses -> Click "+" button to open Add Course modal -> Leave course name input blank -> Click "Añadir" button -> See validation/error toast and no course is added -> Click "Cancelar" to close modal

features.name: Attendance Tracking
features.description: Select a course and mark each student's attendance as presente or ausente, finalize the register and export attendance as CSV. Attendance is stored with a today-based key per course and student.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Asistencia" nav button to view attendance -> Click a course filter to switch to the target course -> See list of students with attendance buttons -> Click green check button next to a student to mark student as "presente" -> Click "Finalizar Registro" button to confirm attendance -> Click download button to export attendance as CSV -> See CSV file downloaded

Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Asistencia" nav button to view attendance -> Click a course filter to switch to the target course -> Click green check button next to a student to mark as "presente" -> Click download button to export attendance as CSV -> See CSV rows use the label "today" for the date -> Observe that attendance dates are stored as "today" and historical dates cannot be reviewed

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create and track tasks (pending/completed) with due dates, mark tasks as completed or reopen them, and create new tasks from a floating/button action.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Tareas" nav button to view tasks -> Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal -> Fill task title input -> Fill due date input -> Click "Crear" button to create task -> See new task in pending list with due date displayed

Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Tareas" nav button to view tasks -> Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal -> Leave task title blank -> Click "Crear" button -> See validation/error toast and modal remains open -> No task is created

features.name: Grades / Performance View
features.description: Dashboard that shows total students, completed/total tasks ratio, and average grades per course with an option to export grades to CSV.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Notas" nav button to view performance -> See total students count displayed -> See completed/total tasks ratio displayed -> Click "Exportar Excel" button to download grades CSV -> See CSV file downloaded

Navigate to /index.html -> Click "Notas" nav button to view performance -> See average grades per course display "8.5" for all courses -> Observe that grade averages are currently hardcoded and may not reflect actual student performance

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Toggle between light and dark themes using the moon/sun icon in the header; theme preference is persisted in localStorage.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click moon/sun icon button in header -> See theme change to dark mode (HTML receives class "dark") -> Reload /index.html -> See dark mode preserved from settings

Navigate to /index.html -> Click moon/sun icon button in header to enable dark mode -> Clear browser localStorage -> Reload /index.html -> See theme reverted to default (dark mode setting lost due to cleared localStorage)

features.name: Data Backup and Restore
features.description: Export the full app state as a JSON backup and restore app state by importing a JSON file via the settings gear menu.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html -> Click settings gear icon in header -> Click "Copia de Seguridad" to download JSON backup -> See toast notification after backup -> Click "Restaurar Copia" -> Upload the previously downloaded JSON file -> See data restored and toast confirmation
Navigate to /index.html -> Click settings gear icon in header -> Click "Restaurar Copia" to open file picker -> Upload a malformed or non-JSON file -> See error toast and no data is restored

routes.description: Main single-page application with 4 views (Cursos, Asistencia, Tareas, Notas)

features.name: User Login / Welcome
features.description: First-time welcome modal where the user enters their name to personalize the app
user_interactions: See welcome modal on first visit
Fill name input field
Click "Empezar ahora" button to submit
See personalized greeting in header after login

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Bottom navigation bar to switch between 4 views (Cursos, Asistencia, Tareas, Notas)
user_interactions: Click "Cursos" nav button to view courses
Click "Asistencia" nav button to view attendance
Click "Tareas" nav button to view tasks
Click "Notas" nav button to view grades/performance
See active nav button highlighted in primary color

features.name: Course Management
features.description: View, create and manage teaching courses with progress tracking
user_interactions: View list of courses with name, schedule, students count and progress
Click "+" button to open Add Course modal
Fill course name input
Fill schedule input
Click "Añadir" button to create new course
Click "Cancelar" to close modal without saving
See toast notification after course creation

features.name: Attendance Tracking
features.description: Mark student attendance as present or absent for each course
user_interactions: View course filter buttons at top
Click a course filter to switch between courses
See list of students with attendance status
Click green check button to mark student as "presente"
Click red X button to mark student as "ausente"
Click "Finalizar Registro" button to confirm attendance
Click download button to export attendance as CSV

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Create and manage homework/assignment tasks with completion tracking
user_interactions: View list of pending and completed tasks
Click "+ Nueva" button to open Add Task modal
Fill task title input
Fill due date input
Click "Crear" button to create task
Click "Marcar Finalizada" to complete a task
Click "Reabrir" to reopen a completed task
Click dashed "Nueva Tarea" button at bottom

features.name: Grades / Performance View
features.description: View academic performance statistics and course averages
user_interactions: View total students count
View completed/total tasks ratio
View average grades per course
Click "Exportar Excel" button to download grades CSV

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
features.description: Toggle between light and dark mode themes
user_interactions: Click moon/sun icon button in header
See theme change to dark or light mode

features.name: Data Backup and Restore
features.description: Export app data as JSON backup and import/restore from JSON file
user_interactions: Click settings gear icon in header
Click "Copia de Seguridad" to download JSON backup
Click "Restaurar Copia" to upload and restore from JSON
See toast notification after backup

known_limitations.issue: All data is stored in localStorage only, no backend API
known_limitations.impact: Data is limited to the browser and can be lost if localStorage is cleared

known_limitations.issue: Grade averages are hardcoded to 8.5 for all courses
known_limitations.impact: The grades view does not reflect real student performance data

known_limitations.issue: Attendance dates are all stored as "today" without actual date tracking
known_limitations.impact: Historical attendance cannot be reviewed per specific date
